mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals strengthening household demand and near-term earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the 3-month RSAFS trend has Rank IC below 0.03 for 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment rises rapidly, equity investors price a higher probability of recession and weaker margins, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 12-month average by more than 0.3 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations generate positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases or have mean returns not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate tightens discount rates and liquidity conditions, lowering equity valuation support and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its 6-month average after rising at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if tightening triggers are followed by higher-than-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least 60% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation acceleration without a matching rise in policy rates erodes real household income and compresses equity risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month inflation rate crosses above its 12-month inflation rate while FEDFUNDS 3-month change is less than 0.10 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS trigger does not produce negative average 60-day S&P 500 excess returns versus non-trigger periods.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production signals falling real output and weaker operating leverage, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO contraction triggers have nonnegative mean 20-day S&P 500 returns or a negative-signal hit rate below 50% out of sample.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in housing starts below trend signals weakening cyclical demand and future construction-related earnings pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average by more than 10%
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside crossings are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered walk-forward cases.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth combined with falling unemployment confirms broad labor-income momentum, raising expected consumption and earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE 3-month change crosses below 0 percentage points
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-UNRATE signal has 5-day forward return Rank IC below 0.02 over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth signals expanding aggregate demand and corporate revenue capacity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth crosses above 0%
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth crossings do not outperform negative or zero growth periods for 60-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests.
